query: interstitial brachytherapy hard palate mucoepidermoid carcinoma implant design
citations: [Interstitial brachytherapy for gynecologic malignancies: Complications, toxicities, and management.](https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/33789823/)
[Interstitial High-Dose-Rate Gynecologic Brachytherapy: Clinical Workflow Experience From Three Academic Institutions.](https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/31727297/)

evidence.claim:
PubMed ID: 33789823. 2021/09/01 00:00. we present the technical data 
related to multicatheter interstitial brachytherapy to the breast proceeding, 
from the implantation of the vectors to the treatme
evidence.source_title: Interstitial brachytherapy for gynecologic malignancies: Complications, toxicities, and management.
evidence.raw_snippet:
PubMed ID: 33789823. 2021/09/01 00:00. we present the technical data 
related to multicatheter interstitial brachytherapy to the breast proceeding, 
from the implantation of the vectors to the treatment itself. The indications 
for brachytherapy in breast cancer are boost after whole breast irradiation, 
accelerated partial breast irradiation or selected patients with second 
ipsilateral breast tumor event. The results in terms of efficacy and toxicity 
are presented for each indication. Multica
